items.headline: Altria (MO) Is Betting More On Nicotine Pouches As Cigarettes Lose Ground
items.summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) is shifting more attention to smoke free products in response to pressure on its traditional cigarette business. The company is prioritizing the development and expansion of oral nicotine pouch offerings as part of this shift. This move follows ongoing industry challenges that include declining cigarette volumes, tighter regulations, and changing consumer habits.
